notes: opencode in-place compaction via the /summarize slash command. opencode is the lone ProcessOwnedStore adapter — the daemon reads per-turn state from the SQLite store (watcher.go), so a /summarize summarization round lands a step-finish part (reason=stop → turn_done, parser.go parseStepFinish) on the SAME ses_ and surfaces to irrlicht as an ordinary ready→working→ready arc on that session. Two priming turns populate context, then /summarize compacts in place (no new session — distinct from session-reset's /new). irrlicht's CompactionState field is dead code, so the daemon cannot LABEL the turn as compaction; the scenario asserts only the visible state arc, which IS observable. The compaction arc is asserted relative to the second turn's end with a wide max_delay_ms because the slow local model's summarization round can run ~30-60s.

text: Session appears in ready after the opencode TUI launches
First priming prompt populates context: ready → working
First priming turn completes back to ready on the same session
Second priming prompt adds more context: ready → working on the same session
Second priming turn completes back to ready on the same session
/summarize starts the in-place summarization round: ready → working on the SAME session (opencode compacts in place — no new session)
The summarization round completes: working → ready on the same session — the compaction turn's terminal step-finish
After compaction the session holds ready — no further turn, no stuck working, never waiting
